message:
test(mission): add SLO dashboard/report artifact validation [ft-1i2ge.6.5]

28 tests covering SLO threshold boundaries, evidence artifact serialisation,
shadow-mode fidelity integration, multi-cycle compliance tracking,
degradation detection, recovery paths, event log integration, safety
envelope metrics, conflict detection stats, and determinism verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,216 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# ft-1i2ge.6.5 — Mission SLO dashboard/report artifacts
+# E2E scenario: validate SLO dashboard tests compile, pass, are clippy-clean,
+# cover all SLO categories, and produce deterministic results.
+
+ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../.." && pwd)"
+LOG_DIR="${ROOT_DIR}/tests/e2e/logs"
+mkdir -p "${LOG_DIR}"
+
+RUN_ID="$(date +"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")"
+SCENARIO_ID="ft_1i2ge_6_5_slo_dashboard"
+CORRELATION_ID="ft-1i2ge.6.5-${RUN_ID}"
+LOG_FILE="${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.jsonl"
+LOG_FILE_REL="${LOG_FILE#${ROOT_DIR}/}"
+
+emit_log() {
+  local outcome="$1"
+  local decision_path="$2"
+  local reason_code="$3"
+  local error_code="$4"
+  local artifact_path="$5"
+  local input_summary="$6"
+  local ts
+  ts="$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
+
+  jq -cn \
+    --arg timestamp "${ts}" \
+    --arg component "slo_dashboard.e2e" \
+    --arg scenario_id "${SCENARIO_ID}" \
+    --arg correlation_id "${CORRELATION_ID}" \
+    --arg decision_path "${decision_path}" \
+    --arg input_summary "${input_summary}" \
+    --arg outcome "${outcome}" \
+    --arg reason_code "${reason_code}" \
+    --arg error_code "${error_code}" \
+    --arg artifact_path "${artifact_path}" \
+    '{
+      timestamp: $timestamp,
+      component: $component,
+      scenario_id: $scenario_id,
+      correlation_id: $correlation_id,
+      decision_path: $decision_path,
+      input_summary: $input_summary,
+      outcome: $outcome,
+      reason_code: $reason_code,
+      error_code: $error_code,
+      artifact_path: $artifact_path
+    }' >> "${LOG_FILE}"
+}
+
+emit_log "started" "script_init" "none" "none" \
+  "$(basename "${LOG_FILE}")" \
+  "SLO dashboard e2e started"
+
+if ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  echo "jq is required for structured logging" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+# ── Test 1: Compile check ──────────────────────────────────────────
+emit_log "running" "compile_check" "cargo_check" "none" \
+  "none" "cargo check SLO dashboard tests"
+
+set +e
+(
+  cd "${ROOT_DIR}"
+  CARGO_TARGET_DIR="target-e2e-1i2ge-6-5-${RUN_ID}" \
+    cargo check -p frankenterm-core --features subprocess-bridge \
+    --test mission_slo_dashboard 2>&1
+) > "${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.compile.log" 2>&1
+compile_rc=$?
+set -e
+
+if [[ ${compile_rc} -ne 0 ]]; then
+  emit_log "failed" "compile_check" "compilation_error" "COMPILE_FAIL" \
+    "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.compile.log" "cargo check failed"
+  echo "FAIL: compilation error" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+emit_log "passed" "compile_check" "compilation_ok" "none" \
+  "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.compile.log" "compilation succeeded"
+
+# ── Test 2: SLO dashboard tests pass ─────────────────────────────
+emit_log "running" "slo_tests" "cargo_test" "none" \
+  "none" "run SLO dashboard tests"
+
+set +e
+(
+  cd "${ROOT_DIR}"
+  CARGO_TARGET_DIR="target-e2e-1i2ge-6-5-${RUN_ID}" \
+    cargo test -p frankenterm-core --features subprocess-bridge \
+    --test mission_slo_dashboard 2>&1
+) > "${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests.log" 2>&1
+test_rc=$?
+set -e
+
+if [[ ${test_rc} -ne 0 ]]; then
+  emit_log "failed" "slo_tests" "test_failure" "TEST_FAIL" \
+    "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests.log" "SLO dashboard tests failed"
+  echo "FAIL: SLO dashboard tests" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+slo_count=$(grep -c "ok$" "${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests.log" || echo 0)
+
+if [[ ${slo_count} -lt 25 ]]; then
+  emit_log "failed" "slo_tests" "insufficient_test_coverage" "COVERAGE_LOW" \
+    "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests.log" \
+    "only ${slo_count} SLO tests passed (expected >=25)"
+  echo "FAIL: insufficient SLO test coverage (${slo_count} < 25)" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+emit_log "passed" "slo_tests" "all_tests_ok" "none" \
+  "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests.log" \
+  "${slo_count} SLO dashboard tests passed"
+
+# ── Test 3: Clippy clean ──────────────────────────────────────────
+emit_log "running" "clippy_check" "cargo_clippy" "none" \
+  "none" "verify zero clippy warnings in SLO dashboard tests"
+
+set +e
+(
+  cd "${ROOT_DIR}"
+  CARGO_TARGET_DIR="target-e2e-1i2ge-6-5-${RUN_ID}" \
+    cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --features subprocess-bridge \
+    --test mission_slo_dashboard 2>&1
+) > "${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.clippy.log" 2>&1
+clippy_rc=$?
+set -e
+
+slo_warnings=$(grep -c "mission_slo_dashboard.rs" "${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.clippy.log" || echo 0)
+if [[ ${slo_warnings} -gt 0 ]]; then
+  emit_log "failed" "clippy_check" "clippy_warnings" "CLIPPY_WARN" \
+    "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.clippy.log" \
+    "${slo_warnings} clippy warnings in mission_slo_dashboard.rs"
+  echo "FAIL: clippy warnings in mission_slo_dashboard.rs" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+emit_log "passed" "clippy_check" "clippy_clean" "none" \
+  "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.clippy.log" "zero clippy warnings"
+
+# ── Test 4: SLO category coverage ────────────────────────────────
+emit_log "running" "category_coverage" "coverage_check" "none" \
+  "none" "validate all SLO categories covered"
+
+missing_categories=0
+
+for pattern in \
+  "slo_" \
+  "evidence_" \
+  "shadow_" \
+  "compliance_" \
+  "degradation_" \
+  "recovery_" \
+  "determinism_"; do
+  if ! grep -q "${pattern}.*ok" "${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests.log"; then
+    echo "MISSING: ${pattern}" >&2
+    missing_categories=$((missing_categories + 1))
+  fi
+done
+
+if [[ ${missing_categories} -gt 0 ]]; then
+  emit_log "failed" "category_coverage" "missing_categories" "COVERAGE_MISSING" \
+    "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests.log" \
+    "${missing_categories} SLO categories missing"
+  echo "FAIL: ${missing_categories} SLO categories missing" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+emit_log "passed" "category_coverage" "all_categories_covered" "none" \
+  "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests.log" "all SLO categories covered"
+
+# ── Test 5: Determinism check ────────────────────────────────────
+emit_log "running" "determinism" "repeat_run" "none" \
+  "none" "verify SLO dashboard results are deterministic"
+
+set +e
+(
+  cd "${ROOT_DIR}"
+  CARGO_TARGET_DIR="target-e2e-1i2ge-6-5-${RUN_ID}" \
+    cargo test -p frankenterm-core --features subprocess-bridge \
+    --test mission_slo_dashboard 2>&1
+) > "${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests_repeat.log" 2>&1
+repeat_rc=$?
+set -e
+
+if [[ ${repeat_rc} -ne 0 ]]; then
+  emit_log "failed" "determinism" "repeat_run_failed" "REPEAT_FAIL" \
+    "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests_repeat.log" "repeat run failed"
+  echo "FAIL: repeat test run" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+pass_count_1=$(grep -c "ok$" "${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests.log" || echo 0)
+pass_count_2=$(grep -c "ok$" "${LOG_DIR}/ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests_repeat.log" || echo 0)
+if [[ ${pass_count_1} -ne ${pass_count_2} ]]; then
+  emit_log "failed" "determinism" "count_mismatch" "DETERMINISM_FAIL" \
+    "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests_repeat.log" \
+    "pass count diverged: ${pass_count_1} vs ${pass_count_2}"
+  echo "FAIL: non-deterministic test counts" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+emit_log "passed" "determinism" "repeat_run_stable" "none" \
+  "ft_1i2ge_6_5_${RUN_ID}.tests_repeat.log" \
+  "test counts stable: ${pass_count_1} == ${pass_count_2}"
+
+# ── Suite complete ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
+emit_log "passed" "suite_complete" "all_scenarios_passed" "none" \
+  "$(basename "${LOG_FILE}")" \
+  "validated SLO dashboard: compilation, ${slo_count} tests, clippy, category coverage, determinism"
+
+# Cleanup ephemeral target dir.
+rm -rf "${ROOT_DIR}/target-e2e-1i2ge-6-5-${RUN_ID}" 2>/dev/null || true
+
+echo "ft-1i2ge.6.5 e2e passed. Logs: ${LOG_FILE_REL}"
